---
title: "Now"
date: 2026-07-07
categories: [personal]
---

[What is a `/now` page?](https://nownownow.com/about)

### Science Problems I Think About Lately

- What if we care less about perfect fidelity in quantum control?
- General robust control speed limit in large quantum systems.
- For large circuits, does "twirling for robustness" generally make sense?
- Gates in semiconductor spin qubits.

### Life

- Not making music or DJing lately, would love to get back into it.
- Relationship with my wife is as great as ever, thanks for asking.
- ADHD is a bitch.
- Life outside work is not as active as I thought it would be.
- Still Boulder.
- Trying to work more.

### Watching

- 《喜剧之王单口季》第二季
